content: pgx v5 CopyFrom(ctx, Identifier, []columns, CopyFromSource) uses PostgreSQL COPY protocol — fastest bulk insert, faster than INSERT with as few as 5 rows. Sources: CopyFromRows([][]any) buffers all; CopyFromSlice(len, next) for typed slices; CopyFromFunc(next) streams without buffering whole dataset. CRITICAL: CopyFrom is a method on *pgx.Conn and pgx.Tx, NOT on *pgxpool.Pool — batch writer must pool.Acquire(ctx) then conn.CopyFrom, or pool.BeginTx then tx.Conn.CopyFrom. pgx v5.10 supports Go 1.25+ and PG 14+. Automatic prepared-statement cache is incompatible with PgBouncer (set QueryExecMode). CollectRows/ForEachRow/RowToStructByName are the row-scan helpers (no sqlx needed).
